description: ab-claude-code hooks：自動格式化、PHP 語法檢查、保護受保護檔案、context 壓縮提示、任務完成確認

hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.vue || "$FILE" == *.js || "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; elif [[ "$FILE" == *.php ]]; then php -l "$FILE" 2>&1 | grep -v 'No syntax errors' || true; fi; exit 0

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; for p in '.env' '.env.local' '.env.production' 'package-lock.json' 'pnpm-lock.yaml' 'yarn.lock' 'composer.lock' 'Podfile.lock'; do [[ "$FILE" == *"$p"* ]] && echo "Blocked: $FILE is protected" >&2 && exit 2; done; exit 0
BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); TICKET=$(echo "$BRANCH" | grep -oE '[A-Z]+-[0-9]+' | head -1); echo "⚠️ Context 已壓縮。保留：當前任務目標、已修改檔案、驗證狀態、未完成 TODO。${TICKET:+Ticket: $TICKET}"

hooks.prompt: 檢查是否所有要求的任務都已完成。如果有遺漏，回傳 {"ok": false, "reason": "尚未完成：<具體項目>"}。如果都完成了，回傳 {"ok": true}。注意：如果 stop_hook_active 為 true，直接回傳 {"ok": true}。
